title: Oh How Delightful!
body:
# " OH HOW DELIGHTFUL! "
This modpack is designed to holster every single farmer's delight mod that I found for forge 1.20.1

Some mods was ignored / excluded due to causing issues, Not having the dependencies for some of the mods on modrinth or already having a mod serve it's purpose already inside the modpack

As stated, This includes **AS MANY ADDON MODS I COULD FIND**
This includes addon mods for other mods such as **Ars Nouveau**

Other then that, Have fun farming!

Credit link for quark : [https://modrinth.com/mod/quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)
